message:
fix(fsfs): prevent infinite loop in snapshot walker on symlink cycles

Add a visited_dirs HashSet with path canonicalization during directory
snapshot traversal. Canonical paths are tracked so that revisited
directories (reachable through symlink cycles) are skipped, preventing
the walker from looping indefinitely on filesystems with circular
symlinks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
